'''Blast bugs''' were projectile [[biot]]s used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A relative of the [[Nang hul|thud bug]], the blast bug was also shaped from a [[sparkbee]]. But unlike the thud and [[razor bug]]s, the blast bug was the Yuuzhan Vong analog of a guided missile. Upon reaching contact with the target, the blast bug would explode, sending the victim hurling through the air, causing severe burns, and even breaching armor. A [[Human/Legends|Human]] caught in the explosion without [[Armor/Legends|armor]] had very little chance of survival.

{{Weapon-stub}}
